_doc: PoE-style monster modifiers applied to magic/rare pack mobs. Each mod has a label (used in the rare's display name), and a set of stat modifiers / status grants. Effects stack by addition (atk_pct/def_pct/hp_pct/move_speed_mult). flavor_tags are passed to combat_defense_tags() so existing tag-driven mechanics (rage/thorns/vampiric) apply automatically.
